name: LinkAttributes
summary: The LinkAttributes class contains the attributes for controlling the appearance of a link.

constructors.name: LinkAttributes
constructors.summary: Creates a new link attributes instance using standard attributes.

constructors.name: LinkAttributes
constructors.summary: Creates a new link attributes instance loading the specified attributes.

params.name: AttributeFile
params.doc: The name of the attribute file.

methods.name: IsEqual
methods.summary: Compares the current object with an object of the same type.

params.name: ObjectToCompare
params.doc: The object to be used for comparing.

returns.doc: True if all the fields (except for the database GUID) of the objects match.

methods.name: LoadAttributes
methods.summary: Loads the link frame attributes from the specified file.

params.name: AttributeFile
params.doc: The name of the attribute file.

properties.name: Font
properties.summary: Gets or sets the font attributes.

properties.name: Frame
properties.summary: Gets or sets the link frame attributes.

properties.name: IsUnderlined
properties.summary: Defines whether the link is underlined or not.

properties.name: Scaling
properties.summary: Gets or sets the link scaling options.
